# Pest Xpert - Business Summary
Pest Xpert provides professional pest control solutions in Bhatkal, Karnataka, India.

## Core Services
- Termite Control: Property protection and damage prevention.
- Cockroach Control: Elimination and re-infestation prevention.
- Rodent Control: Safe trapping and exclusion.
- Ant & Fly Control: Hygiene and colony elimination.
- Bed Bug Control: Deep treatment for residential and commercial beds.
- Mosquito Control: Disease prevention and yard misting.
- Snake Control: Emergency, safe, and professional snake removal.

## Contact & Location
- Primary Phone: +91 9916407740
- Secondary Phone: +91 9916407740
- Service Area: Bhatkal and surrounding regions.
- Website: https://www.pestxpert.in
